description: A vertical graphic on a dark blue background with red and blue glows. Two officers are shown from behind in black tactical vests; the left vest reads POLICE ICE and the right vest reads SHERIFF. White text below reads Keep your community safer, and large serif text reads Partner with ICE. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement appear at the bottom left, with ICE.gov/287g at the bottom right.
notable_text: POLICE ICE; SHERIFF; Keep your community safer - Partner with ICE; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; ICE.gov/287g
